title: Amtech S4146 12 Piece round tip art brush set
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ROUND TIPS: An assortment of 12 paint brushes with rounded tips, ranging in length from 22-24cm
WOODEN HANDLES: These brushes have traditional wooden handles with the sizes printed on each one
ALL TYPES OF ART PROJECTS: Ideal for all types of arts and crafts projects, including painting canvasses, ceramics and models
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and Tool products come with a twelve month guarantee and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks. Am-Tech produces their products from the best materials possible and at the best cost to ensure you are getting a real value for money offering. Safety Warning No Box Contains 12x Brush See more
